message: ci: continue sweep while backlog remains

files.patch:
@@ -36,6 +36,7 @@ on:
 
 permissions:
   contents: write
+  actions: write
   issues: write
   pull-requests: write
 
@@ -53,6 +54,7 @@ jobs:
       codex_timeout_ms: ${{ steps.mode.outputs.codex_timeout_ms }}
       matrix: ${{ steps.select.outputs.matrix }}
       planned_count: ${{ steps.select.outputs.planned_count }}
+      planned_capacity: ${{ steps.select.outputs.planned_capacity }}
       planned_shards: ${{ steps.select.outputs.planned_shards }}
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -108,6 +110,7 @@ jobs:
           const plan = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("plan.json", "utf8"));
           console.log(`matrix=${JSON.stringify(plan.matrix)}`);
           console.log(`planned_count=${plan.candidates.length}`);
+          console.log(`planned_capacity=${Number(process.env.BATCH_SIZE || 20) * Number(process.env.SHARD_COUNT || 10)}`);
           console.log(`planned_shards=${plan.matrix.length}`);
           NODE
           cat plan.json
@@ -203,7 +206,7 @@ jobs:
           if-no-files-found: ignore
 
   publish:
-    needs: review
+    needs: [plan, review]
     if: ${{ always() && (github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch' || github.event.inputs.apply_existing != 'true') }}
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
@@ -248,6 +251,19 @@ jobs:
             git push
           fi
 
+      - name: Continue sweep
+        if: ${{ success() && needs.plan.outputs.apply_closures != 'true' && needs.plan.outputs.planned_count == needs.plan.outputs.planned_capacity && (github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch' || github.event.inputs.item_number == '') }}
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
+        run: |
+          gh workflow run "Sweep OpenClaw Items" \
+            --ref main \
+            -f apply_closures=false \
+            -f apply_existing=false \
+            -f batch_size="${{ needs.plan.outputs.batch_size }}" \
+            -f shard_count="${{ needs.plan.outputs.planned_shards }}" \
+            -f codex_timeout_ms="${{ needs.plan.outputs.codex_timeout_ms }}"
+
   apply-existing:
     if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.apply_existing == 'true' }}
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

@@ -67,7 +67,7 @@ Each review job:
 
 Codex runs without GitHub write tokens. The runner checks the OpenClaw checkout before every review, makes the checkout read-only in CI, checks it again after review, and fails the item if Codex leaves any tracked or untracked change behind.
 
-Parallel workflow shards only receive planned item numbers. The final job merges artifacts and updates this README so the dashboard reflects progress.
+Parallel workflow shards only receive planned item numbers. The final job merges artifacts and updates this README so the dashboard reflects progress. If the planner filled the current worker capacity, the publish job dispatches the next proposal-only sweep automatically.
 
 To close later without rerunning Codex, dispatch the workflow with `apply_existing=true`. That mode reads existing `items/*.md`, refetches the issue/PR context, recomputes the snapshot hash, and only comments/closes if nothing changed since the proposal was written.
